languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, вам что-то известно о подкреплениях от рода Гапраков?"
"Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, вам что-то известно о подкреплениях от рода Гапраков?"

traits.locale_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"
"Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"
"Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

languages.text: “大人，关于贾帕克家族的援军，您有什么消息吗？”
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

traits.locale_text: “大人，关于贾帕克家族的援军，您有什么消息吗？”

languages.text: « Savez-vous quoi que ce soit au sujet des renforts envoyés par la maison Gaprak, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

traits.locale_text: « Savez-vous quoi que ce soit au sujet des renforts envoyés par la maison Gaprak, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: "Gaprak Hanesi takviyeleri konusunda bilgin var mı?"
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak Hanesi takviyeleri konusunda bilgin var mı?"

languages.text: «Milord, ¿sabe algo sobre los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak?».
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

traits.locale_text: «Milord, ¿sabe algo sobre los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak?».

languages.text: "Eure Lordschaft, wisst Ihr etwas über die Verstärkungen von Haus Gaprak?"
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure Lordschaft, wisst Ihr etwas über die Verstärkungen von Haus Gaprak?"

languages.text: 「殿、ガプラク家の増援について何かお聞きになったことはございますか？」
languages.original_text: "Your Lordship, do you know anything about the reinforcements from House Gaprak?"

traits.locale_text: 「殿、ガプラク家の増援について何かお聞きになったことはございますか？」
